annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Unified window-rule store: query and mutate the rule set that maps windows to zones. Rules cross the wire as JSON strings — a single rule serializes to { id, name, enabled, priority, match, actions } and the whole set is a JSON object { _version, rules }. The daemon's WindowRuleStore stays the sole writer of windowrules.json.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return the whole rule set as a JSON object string ({ _version, rules }). Empty string if the store is unavailable.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: JSON object string in the { _version, rules } shape.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Replace the entire rule set. The payload is a JSON object string in the { _version, rules } shape (or a bare object whose rules array carries the list). Malformed entries are dropped and a warning logs the dropped/accepted/total counts. True if the payload parsed; a genuine change is also persisted.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: JSON object string carrying the rules array.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if the payload parsed; a genuine change is also persisted.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Append one rule from its JSON object string. Returns false if the JSON is malformed, the rule fails validation, or its id collides with an existing rule.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: JSON object string for a single rule ({ id, name, enabled, priority, match, actions }).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if the rule was added.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Replace the rule with the same id from its JSON object string. Returns false if the JSON is malformed, the rule fails validation, or no rule with that id exists.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: JSON object string for a single rule ({ id, name, enabled, priority, match, actions }).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if the rule was replaced.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Remove the rule with the given id. Returns false if the id is malformed or no rule with that id exists.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Rule UUID string.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if a rule was removed.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Set the enabled flag of the rule with the given id. Returns false if the id is malformed or no rule with that id exists.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Rule UUID string.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True to enable the rule, false to disable it.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if the rule's enabled flag was updated.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Set the priority of the rule with the given id. Higher priority wins when multiple rules match a window. Returns false if the id is malformed or no rule with that id exists.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Rule UUID string.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: New priority value.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if the rule's priority was updated.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted whenever the store's rule set changes (add, update, remove, enable, priority, or full replace).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True when the in-memory change was successfully written to disk. False signals an in-memory mutation whose persist failed — consumers can branch on this to differentiate 'saved' from 'edited but divergent from disk'.
